findings.message: Role 'role-with-wildcard-verbs' uses wildcard (*) in verbs, granting all actions (get, list, create, update, patch, delete, etc.). This violates least privilege principle. Specify explicit verbs instead.

Role 'role-with-wildcard-resources' uses wildcard (*) in resources, granting access to all resource types (pods, secrets, configmaps, etc.). This violates least privilege principle. Specify explicit resource types instead.
Role 'role-with-wildcard-apigroups' uses wildcard (*) in apiGroups, granting access to all API groups. This violates least privilege principle. Specify explicit API groups instead.

Role 'role-with-all-wildcards' uses wildcard (*) in verbs, granting all actions (get, list, create, update, patch, delete, etc.). This violates least privilege principle. Specify explicit verbs instead.

Role 'role-with-all-wildcards' uses wildcard (*) in resources, granting access to all resource types (pods, secrets, configmaps, etc.). This violates least privilege principle. Specify explicit resource types instead.
Role 'role-with-all-wildcards' uses wildcard (*) in apiGroups, granting access to all API groups. This violates least privilege principle. Specify explicit API groups instead.
